mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupons (user_id, coupon_type, coupon_name, discount_rate, threshold_amount, reduce_amount, expires_at, source_type, source_ref_id, status, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponType}, #{couponName}, #{discountRate}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{reduceAmount}, #{expiresAt}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{status}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_coupons WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNUSED' AND quantity > 0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_coupons WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNUSED' AND quantity > 0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupons SET quantity = quantity - 1, status = CASE WHEN quantity - 1 <= 0 THEN 'USED' ELSE status END, used_at = CASE WHEN quantity - 1 <= 0 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE used_at END, order_id = CASE WHEN quantity - 1 <= 0 THEN #{orderId} ELSE order_id END WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNUSED' AND quantity > 0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
